DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
accessibility artifact-reference example extensions guideline link metadata rich-text status usecase
anatomy api component design-specifications state variant
token
style
pattern

DSDS Token Definitions

Definitions for documenting design tokens and token groups.

Source: tokens/token.schema.json

4 definitions in this file:

  • tokenValue
  • tokenApi
  • tokenDoc
  • tokenGroupDoc

tokenValue

A displayable representation of the token's value for documentation tools.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
resolvedstringoptionalThe resolved value as a human-readable string.
referencestringoptionalIf this token is an alias, the name of the referenced token.
dtcgFilestringoptionalURI or relative path to the DTCG file.

tokenApi

Platform-specific identifiers for a token. Keys are platform names (e.g., 'cssCustomProperty', 'scssVariable', 'jsConstant', 'iosToken', 'androidToken', 'designToolVariable') and values are the identifier strings for that platform. Additional platforms can be added without schema changes.

object

Open map: keys are strings, values are string

tokenDoc

Documentation for a single design token.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe token name. Token names are intentionally unconstrained by a pattern to accommodate DTCG and design tool naming conventions that use dots, slashes, or other separators (e.g., 'color-text-primary', 'color.text.primary', 'color/text/primary').
displayNamestringrequiredHuman-readable name.
descriptionrichTextrequired
statusstatusrequired
tokenTypestringrequiredThe type of token aligned with the DTCG spec.
summarystringoptionalA one-line, plain-text summary. MUST NOT contain markup.
deprecationNoticestringoptionalRequired when status is 'deprecated'.
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this token was introduced.
tagsstring[]optionalFreeform keywords to relate guidelines across categories/disciplines (e.g., 'rtl', 'localization', 'validation').
categorystringoptionalThe token's semantic category. Standard values: 'base' (raw palette values, not used directly in components), 'semantic' (purpose-driven tokens that map to base values, e.g., 'color-text-primary'), 'component' (tokens scoped to a specific component, e.g., 'button-background'). Custom values are permitted and SHOULD be lowercase kebab-case.
valuetokenValueoptional
aliasesstring[]optionalNames of tokens that alias this token.
apitokenApioptional
useCasesuseCasesoptional
guidelinesguideline[]optionalUsage guidelines for the token. Each entry is a self-contained guideline. Use the `category` property on individual guidelines to group by concern (e.g., 'design', 'accessibility', 'content').
accessibilityaccessibilityObjectoptional
linkslink[]optionalExternal resource links and related artifact references.
$extensionsextensionsoptional

Conditional: When status is "deprecated", then deprecationNotice is required.

References: richText, status, tokenValue, tokenApi, useCases, guideline, accessibilityObject, link, extensions

tokenGroupDoc

Documentation for a group of related design tokens.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe token group name. Token group names are intentionally unconstrained by a pattern to accommodate DTCG and design tool naming conventions (e.g., 'color-text', 'color.text', 'color/text').
displayNamestringrequiredHuman-readable name.
descriptionrichTextrequired
statusstatusrequired
summarystringoptionalA one-line, plain-text summary. MUST NOT contain markup.
deprecationNoticestringoptionalRequired when status is 'deprecated'.
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this group was introduced.
tagsstring[]optionalFreeform keywords to relate guidelines across categories/disciplines (e.g., 'rtl', 'localization', 'validation').
tokenstokenDoc[]optionalIndividual token documentation within the group.
useCasesuseCasesoptional
guidelinesguideline[]optionalUsage guidelines for the token group. Each entry is a self-contained guideline. Use the `category` property on individual guidelines to group by concern (e.g., 'design', 'accessibility', 'content').
accessibilityaccessibilityObjectoptional
linkslink[]optionalExternal resource links and related artifact references.
$extensionsextensionsoptional

Conditional: When status is "deprecated", then deprecationNotice is required.

References: richText, status, tokenDoc, useCases, guideline, accessibilityObject, link, extensions
